title: AI-Powered Product Description for a New Smartwatch
scenario: Write a product description for a new smartwatch targeting 18-40-year-old fitness enthusiasts and tech-savvy individuals.
constraints: Must include at least 2 key features of the smartwatch
Use a modern and engaging tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the description accurately highlights the smartwatch's key features and benefits.
Check if the tone is modern and engaging throughout the description.
Assess if the description accurately targets the 18-40-year-old fitness enthusiast and tech-savvy individual persona.
